response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience (18+ years) across diverse domains, including AI-agent infrastructure at Naver and cloud/AWS CDK work at Tencent. However, his current roles emphasize general software development rather than specialized AI/ML leadership. His entrepreneurial founder experience is promising but not directly aligned with cloud/AI platform strategy. His lack of a graduate degree and limited public recognition in AI (e.g., no published research or high-profile AI products) are notable gaps for a director-level role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: 18+ years of progressive software engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Demonstrated technical leadership through founding and scaling open-source platforms
concerns: Limited visible expertise in AI/ML-specific products or platforms beyond general software development
No graduate degree (preferred qualification) and no clear public recognition in AI
Current roles focus more on software craftsmanship than strategic AI/cloud platform leadership
